message:
fix: Add Windows platform compatibility for CI

- Replace std.time.sleep → std.Thread.sleep globally (41 files)
  std.time.sleep uses POSIX nanosleep which isn't available on Windows

- resolution.zig: Add comptime Windows check for std.posix.getenv
  Windows uses WTF-16 encoded env vars, not UTF-8

- compiler.zig: Add comptime Windows check for SIG.KILL
  Windows doesn't have POSIX signals, use TerminateProcess instead

- aho_corasick_cache.zig: Add comptime Windows fallback for mmap
  Use file.readToEndAlloc on Windows instead of POSIX mmap

All fixes use comptime so they're zero-cost on Linux/macOS builds.
